## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the changes -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New API endpoint
- [ ] New MCP server / tool
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added/updated **unit tests** for any new business logic
- [ ] I have added/updated **integration tests** for any new API endpoints
- [ ] I have added/updated **MCP tests** for any new MCP tools
- [ ] I have updated **README.md** with new endpoint docs / usage examples
- [ ] I have updated **ARCHITECTURE.md** if architectural patterns changed
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`ruff format app/ tests/`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check app/ tests/`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are committed
